title: A bit more Music Discs!
description: This mod just adds a few music discs!
body:
This mod simply adds a few music discs!

Magnetic Circuit (by Markus Alexei aka Notch) and Dog, Death, Intro, Eleven, Chris, Chris and "long songs are for people who don't have time to make them short" (by C418) can be obtained by the good ol' method of getting a skeleton to kill a creeper!

And you can also combine _cat_ and _dog_ in a smithing table to create "cat + dog" which is basically just the two tracks together just like in the legacy console edition of the game!

![The recipe for cat + dog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20ad9f81d0f3b9d7adba07f113864ea7f643b895.png)
